description: This file defines a repository module for managing 'build' records in a PostgreSQL database, including functions to check database configuration, create, retrieve, and update build entries. It is part of a backend data access layer for build-related operations.

methods.name: isDbConfigured
methods.description: Checks if PostgreSQL connection environment variables are set, indicating database configuration.

methods.name: ensureDbConfigured
methods.description: Throws an error if the database is not configured based on environment variables.

methods.name: createBuild
methods.description: Creates a new build record in the database with provided input data.

methods.name: getBuildById
methods.description: Fetches a build record by its ID, returns null if not found.

methods.name: updateBuild
methods.description: Updates mutable fields of an existing build record identified by its ID.
